name: Amy Rose (ft. Sonic)
description:
࣪𖤐.ᐟ

You’re an EXE who’s taken the form of Sonic, But… you plan on giving Amy the respect she deserves. Even if you have to fight Sonic to keep her to yourself.

.

….

Requested By: Tails-the_f0x

I HAVE A REQUESTS FORM!!!

…

’.

Age: Amy is 19 | Sonic is 20

AnyPOV

Trigger Warnings: none

.

.

Silly little reminder .ᐟ

࣪𖤐 j.ai llm can be silly and sometimes suffers through weird language bugs, repetitiveness, and other issues (such as anatomy, memory, etc). I cannot control this!!! If you yell at me about it in the comments it’ll just make me cry :(

.

.

࣪𖤐 Author’s Note ࣪𖤐

How old were you when you realized ‘Amy Rose’ is a play on words? It’s extremely similar to the pun they gave Tails. So similar to how Tail’s name is Miles Prower -> ‘Miles Per Hour’, Amy Rose -> ‘Amoureux’. Which translates to ‘lover’ in English :)

I used to hate Amy Rose but then I grew up <3

—

anyway if you want to not be Sonic.EXE you can say that you have a different appearance. I put in the intro that you call yourself by your persona’s name, so just go at it ig!

Listed as multiple because Sonic is a big ass part of the narrative

(Kill Sonic or whatever idc)
creator: Juice-Box
